records.question: Which orders placed exactly at '1976-09-01 09:27:00' with an order status exactly equal to 'Packing' have associated customers and associated shipments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE orders.date_order_placed = '1976-09-01 09:27:00' AND orders.order_status = 'Packing'
records.pred_sql: select orders.order_id from orders join customers on orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id join shipments on shipments.order_id = orders.order_id where orders.date_order_placed = '1976-09-01 09:27:00' and orders.order_status = 'Packing' limit 5;
records.thought: We need orders with the specified date and status, that have a matching customer and at least one associated shipment. We'll join Orders to Customers and Shipments, and filter by the given values.

records.question: Which orders were placed exactly on 1979-12-07 02:03:49?
records.gold_sql:

WHERE orders.date_order_placed = '1979-12-07 02:03:49'
records.pred_sql: select orders.order_id from orders where orders.date_order_placed = '1979-12-07 02:03:49' limit 5;

records.question: What orders were placed on or before 2002-09-13 07:38:09 by customers whose details are exactly commodi?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_details = 'commodi' AND orders.date_order_placed <= '2002-09-13 07:38:09'
records.pred_sql: select orders.order_id from orders join customers on orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id where orders.date_order_placed <= '2002-09-13 07:38:09' and customers.customer_details = 'commodi' limit 5;
records.thought: We need orders placed on or before the given date, and only by customers whose customer_details are exactly 'commodi'. We'll join Orders with Customers and filter accordingly.

records.question: Which orders with status Shipped were placed on or after 1974-06-24 22:10:26 by customer Hershel whose details are vel, and shipped on or after 1985-11-12 12:41:34 with shipment tracking number 2421?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Hershel' AND shipments.shipment_date >= '1985-11-12 12:41:34' AND orders.date_order_placed >= '1974-06-24 22:10:26' AND shipments.shipment_tracking_number = '2421' AND customers.customer_details = 'vel' AND orders.order_status = 'Shipped'
records.pred_sql: select orders.order_id from orders join customers on orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id join shipments on shipments.order_id = orders.order_id where orders.order_status = 'Shipped' and orders.date_order_placed >= '1974-06-24 22:10:26' and lower(customers.customer_name) like '%hershel%' and lower(customers.customer_details) like '%vel%' and shipments.shipment_date >= '1985-11-12 12:41:34' and shipments.shipment_tracking_number = '2421' limit 5;
records.thought: We need orders with status 'Shipped', placed on or after the given date, by customers named 'Hershel' whose details contain 'vel', and with shipments shipped on or after the given date and tracking number '2421'. This requires joining Orders, Customers, and Shipments.

records.question: Which orders have customers with customer_details equal to 'officia' and customer_name equal to 'Jeramie', and that also have related order_items and shipments records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE customers.customer_details = 'officia' AND customers.customer_name = 'Jeramie'
records.pred_sql: select orders.order_id from orders join customers on orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id join order_items on order_items.order_id = orders.order_id join shipments on shipments.order_id = orders.order_id where customers.customer_details = 'officia' and customers.customer_name = 'Jeramie' limit 5;
records.thought: We need orders where the related customer has customer_details = 'officia' and customer_name = 'Jeramie', and there must be related order_items and shipments records. We'll join Orders to Customers, Order_Items, and Shipments, and filter accordingly.

records.question: Which orders have shipments with tracking number 0114 sent on or before 1977-11-10 12:11:25 and come from customers whose details are exactly officia?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE shipments.shipment_tracking_number = '0114' AND shipments.shipment_date <= '1977-11-10 12:11:25' AND customers.customer_details = 'officia'
records.pred_sql: select orders.order_id from orders join shipments on orders.order_id = shipments.order_id join customers on orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id where shipments.shipment_tracking_number = '0114' and shipments.shipment_date <= '1977-11-10 12:11:25' and customers.customer_details = 'officia' limit 5;
records.thought: We need orders with shipments having a specific tracking number and shipment date, and the orders must be from customers whose details are exactly 'officia'. We'll join Orders, Shipments, and Customers, and filter accordingly.
